description: Refactor PPL-to-SQL translation from string-based PPLToSqlTranspiler to SqlNode-based PPLToSqlNodeConverter with a two-tier design (base static + DynamicPPLToSqlNodeConverter with schema). Add PPLTypeCoercion extending Calcite TypeCoercionImpl for PPL implicit type conversion rules. Goal: zero regressions against the string transpiler baseline.

userStories.title: Snapshot string-transpiler baseline
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to record the current PPLToSqlTranspiler pass rate so that I have a regression target for the new converter.
acceptanceCriteria: Run scripts/ppl_it_rate.sh with current string transpiler
Save summary.json to docs/dev/baseline-string-transpiler.json
Save per-class.csv to docs/dev/baseline-string-transpiler-per-class.csv
Save failures.txt to docs/dev/baseline-string-transpiler-failures.txt
Commit baseline files
userStories.notes: Baseline captured: 2264 total, 1325 passed, 795 failed, 144 skipped, 58.5% rate

userStories.title: Create SqlNodeDSL utility class
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a thin SqlNode builder DSL so that PPL-to-SqlNode conversion reads as declarative SQL construction.
acceptanceCriteria: Create api/src/main/java/org/opensearch/sql/calcite/utils/SqlNodeDSL.java
Implement: select, from, where, groupBy, orderBy, limit, offset returning SqlSelect
Implement: star, identifier, literal, table, subquery, asList helpers
Implement: comparison operators (gt, lt, eq, neq, gte, lte)
Implement: arithmetic operators (plus, minus, times, divide, mod)
Implement: call, agg, cast, as, between, in, caseWhen, window helpers
Implement: and, or, not logical operators
Unit test: select(star()).from(table('t')).build() produces valid SqlSelect
Unit test: nested subquery wrapping produces correct SQL text
Build passes
userStories.notes: SqlNodeDSL.java (327 lines) with SelectBuilder fluent API + 30 static factory methods. SqlNodeDSLTest.java with 5 tests covering select/subquery/orderBy/aggregation/expressions.

userStories.title: Create base PPLToSqlNodeConverter with 5 core commands
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a base converter that handles source, where, fields (include-only), sort, and head so that the architecture is proven.
acceptanceCriteria: Create api/src/main/java/org/opensearch/sql/api/PPLToSqlNodeConverter.java extending AbstractNodeVisitor<SqlNode, Void>
Entry point: public SqlNode convert(Statement statement)
Flatten AST chain and iterate via visitor dispatch (no if/else-if chain)
visitRelation: SELECT * FROM table
visitFilter: wrap as subquery + WHERE condition
visitProject: SELECT col1, col2 (include-only, no exclude)
visitSort: ORDER BY
visitHead: LIMIT
Pipe chaining via subquery wrapping works for multi-command queries
Unit test: source=t | where a > 1 | fields b, c | sort b | head 10
Build passes
userStories.notes: PPLToSqlNodeConverter.java (253 lines) with 5 core commands + minimal expression visitors (Compare, And, Or, Not, QualifiedName, Field, Literal, AllFields). PPLToSqlNodeConverterTest.java with 6 tests. Commit: d89fb0596

userStories.title: Port expression visitors and FUNC_MAP
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all PPL expression types converted to SqlNode so that commands can reference any PPL expression.
acceptanceCriteria: visitLiteral: NULL, integer, long, float, double, string, boolean, date, time, timestamp
visitQualifiedName/visitField: SqlIdentifier
visitAlias: SqlBasicCall(AS)
visitCompare: all comparison operators
visitAnd/Or/Not/Xor: logical operators
visitFunction: FUNC_MAP lookup (~60 entries) + special cases (if→CASE, log→LN, division→zero-guard)
visitAggregateFunction: COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, etc.
visitIn/Between/Case/Cast/Span/Interval: corresponding SqlNode types
visitAllFields: SqlIdentifier.star()
visitWindowFunction: SqlWindow node
visitInSubquery/ScalarSubquery/ExistsSubquery: subquery expressions
Unit tests for each expression type
Build passes
userStories.notes: Added 16 expression visitors: visitAlias, visitEqualTo, visitXor, visitFunction (with arithmetic ops, if/ifnull/isnull/log/like special cases + FUNC_MAP fallback), visitAggregateFunction (COUNT DISTINCT, countStar), visitIn, visitBetween, visitCase, visitCast, visitSpan, visitInterval, visitWindowFunction, visitLet, visitInSubquery, visitScalarSubquery, visitExistsSubquery. Enhanced visitLiteral for DATE/TIME/TIMESTAMP/DOUBLE/FLOAT/LONG. Enhanced visitCompare for REGEXP. Added notLike/exists/inSub to SqlNodeDSL. 17 unit tests all pass.

userStories.title: Add stats (aggregation) command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the stats command converted to SqlNode so that GROUP BY queries work.
acceptanceCriteria: visitAggregation: SELECT agg_exprs, group_exprs FROM (...) GROUP BY group_exprs
Handle span expressions in GROUP BY
Handle bucket_nullable=false via WHERE field IS NOT NULL
Handle multiple aggregation functions in one stats command
Unit test: source=t | stats avg(a) by b
Unit test: source=t | stats count() as cnt, sum(a) as total by b, span(c, 10)
Build passes
userStories.notes: Added visitAggregation (50 lines) handling agg expressions, group-by, span, and bucket_nullable. 4 unit tests. Commit: eda6947f6

userStories.title: Add eval command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the eval command converted to SqlNode so that computed columns work.
acceptanceCriteria: visitEval: wrap as subquery, SELECT *, expr AS alias
Handle forward-reference inlining within same eval batch
Handle self-referencing eval (column override) with SELECT *, expr AS col (let validator handle duplicate)
Unit test: source=t | eval x = a + 1
Unit test: source=t | eval x = a + 1, y = x * 2 (forward reference)
Build passes
userStories.notes: Added visitEval (26 lines) with SqlShuttle-based forward-reference inlining. 3 unit tests. Commit: 800e583b0

userStories.title: Add dedup command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the dedup command converted to SqlNode so that deduplication works.
acceptanceCriteria: Standard dedup: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY fields) + wrap + WHERE _rn <= N
Handle keepempty=true via OR field IS NULL
Consecutive dedup: LAG-based comparison
Unit test: source=t | dedup a
Unit test: source=t | dedup 2 a, b keepempty=true
Build passes
userStories.notes: Added visitDedupe (77 lines) with standard dedup (ROW_NUMBER OVER PARTITION BY), keepempty=true (OR IS NULL), and consecutive dedup (gaps-and-islands with _global_rn/_group_rn). 3 unit tests. Commit: 2c94fb4bb

userStories.title: Add join and lookup commands
userStories.description: As a developer, I want join and lookup commands converted to SqlNode.
acceptanceCriteria: visitJoin: INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL, CROSS join types
SEMI/ANTI join rewrite to WHERE EXISTS/NOT EXISTS
visitLookup: LEFT JOIN with REPLACE/APPEND output strategies
Handle join aliases (left=l, right=r)
Unit test: source=t1 | join left=l right=r ON l.id = r.id t2
Unit test: source=t1 | lookup t2 id AS id
Build passes
userStories.notes: Added visitJoin (INNER/LEFT/RIGHT/FULL/CROSS via SqlJoin, SEMI/ANTI via EXISTS/NOT EXISTS), visitLookup (LEFT JOIN with REPLACE/APPEND output), resolveJoinRight, extractRelation, buildFieldListCondition helpers. Added join() to SqlNodeDSL. 6 unit tests. Commit: 7d7439d7f

userStories.title: Add subquery, window, and remaining core commands
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all remaining core commands ported so that the converter has feature parity with the string transpiler.
acceptanceCriteria: visitRareTopN: aggregate + ROW_NUMBER + filter
visitTrendline: SMA/WMA via window functions
visitWindow (eventstats): SELECT *, agg OVER (...)
visitStreamWindow (streamstats): running window with frame spec
visitAppend: UNION ALL
visitBin: CASE WHEN or FLOOR-based bucketing
visitReplace: REGEXP_REPLACE
visitRename: SELECT col AS new_name (non-wildcard)
visitFillNull: COALESCE(col, value)
visitParse/Rex/Regex: REGEXP_EXTRACT / REGEXP_CONTAINS
Build passes
userStories.notes: Added 10 visit methods: visitRareTopN (GROUP BY + ROW_NUMBER + filter), visitTrendline (SMA/WMA via window functions), visitWindow (eventstats: SELECT *, agg OVER PARTITION BY), visitStreamWindow (running window with frame spec), visitAppend (UNION ALL), visitBin (SpanBin: FLOOR-based bucketing with time/log/numeric spans), visitReplace (REPLACE/REGEXP_REPLACE), visitRename (SELECT *, old AS new), visitFillNull (COALESCE), visitParse (REGEXP_EXTRACT per named group). Added windowWithFrame and unionAll helpers to SqlNodeDSL. Added buildWindowAggSql, windowBoundToSqlNode, transpileSpanToSqlNode, getFieldName helpers. 8 new unit tests. Commit: 98b924310

userStories.title: Create PPLTypeCoercion with MYSQL_5 conformance
userStories.description: As a developer, I want PPL implicit type coercion rules injected into Calcite validation so that cross-type comparisons produce explicit CASTs.
acceptanceCriteria: Create core/src/main/java/org/opensearch/sql/calcite/type/PPLTypeCoercion.java extending TypeCoercionImpl
Override binaryComparisonCoercion: add DATE + TIME → TIMESTAMP rule
Evaluate if builtinFunctionCoercion override is needed (Calcite defaults may suffice)
Register via TypeCoercionFactory in UnifiedQueryContext.buildFrameworkConfig()
Use SqlConformanceEnum.MYSQL_5 as base conformance for BOOLEAN↔NUMBER coercion
Unit test: WHERE date_field > time_field → both cast to TIMESTAMP
Unit test: WHERE int_field > '25' → string cast to numeric (verify Calcite default handles this)
Build passes
userStories.notes: PPLTypeCoercion.java (48 lines) extending TypeCoercionImpl with DATE+TIME→TIMESTAMP coercion via commonTypeForBinaryComparison override. Registered in UnifiedQueryContext via .sqlValidatorConfig(SqlValidator.Config.DEFAULT.withTypeCoercionFactory(PPLTypeCoercion::new)). PPLTypeCoercionTest.java with 2 tests: testDateTimeComparisonCoercesToTimestamp, testIntegerStringComparisonCoerced. Commit: 4e2ad0cf5

userStories.title: Create DynamicPPLToSqlNodeConverter with schema-dependent commands
userStories.description: As a developer, I want schema-dependent commands (fields -, wildcard rename, fillnull all-fields) to resolve columns from SchemaPlus.
acceptanceCriteria: Create api/src/main/java/org/opensearch/sql/api/DynamicPPLToSqlNodeConverter.java extending PPLToSqlNodeConverter
Constructor takes SchemaPlus schema
Helper: resolveColumns(String tableName) → List<String>
Override visitProject: handle fields - (exclude) by enumerating columns from schema
Override visitRename: handle wildcard rename by resolving matching columns
Override visitFillNull: handle all-fields mode by enumerating columns
Override visitEval: handle column override with explicit column enumeration
Unit test with in-memory schema: source=t | fields - a (where t has columns a, b, c)
Build passes
userStories.notes: DynamicPPLToSqlNodeConverter.java (207 lines) extending PPLToSqlNodeConverter with SchemaPlus. Overrides: visitRelation (captures tableName), visitProject (fields - exclude), visitRename (wildcard via WildcardRenameUtils), visitFillNull (all-fields COALESCE), visitEval (column override with explicit column list), convertSubPlan (returns Dynamic subclass). DynamicPPLToSqlNodeConverterTest.java with 3 tests. Commit: c50f243a7

userStories.title: Wire converter into PPLIntegTestCase V4 routing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the integration tests to use the new SqlNode converter so that I can measure regression.
acceptanceCriteria: Update PPLIntegTestCase V4 routing to use DynamicPPLToSqlNodeConverter
Convert AST → SqlNode → SqlNode.toSqlString() → send to /_plugins/_sql endpoint
Alternatively: convert → validate → rel → execute via full pipeline
Verify at least one simple PPL query works end-to-end: source=index | head 5
Build passes
userStories.notes: Replaced PPLToSqlTranspiler.transpile() with DynamicPPLToSqlNodeConverter pipeline in PPLIntegTestCase V4 routing. Added lazy SchemaPlus backed by OpenSearchIndex tables (same pattern as UnifiedQueryOpenSearchIT). transpileV4() pipeline: parse → convert → toSqlString. Build passes for both :api and :integ-test modules.

userStories.title: Regression comparison: zero regressions vs baseline
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to verify the SqlNode converter passes every test the string transpiler passed.
acceptanceCriteria: Run scripts/ppl_it_rate.sh with new converter
Diff failures against docs/dev/baseline-string-transpiler-failures.txt
Zero regressions: every test that passed with string transpiler also passes with SqlNode converter
Document any new passes (bonus from PPLTypeCoercion) in progress.txt
If regressions exist, fix them in the converter and re-run until zero regressions
userStories.notes: Iteration 1: Fixed JSON escaping (newlines in SQL), function quoting (SqlBasicFunction vs SqlUnresolvedFunction), deferred ORDER BY/LIMIT, BigDecimal literals, date/time/timestamp→CAST, EXTRACT-based datetime functions, PPL-specific aggregates (first/last/earliest/latest/take/median/percentile/var/stddev), ilike operator. Results: 934/2264 passed (41.3%), 414 regressions remaining. Major remaining categories: CalciteDateTimeComparisonIT (72 - type coercion), CalcitePPLAggregationIT (56 - stats/agg), CalcitePPLBuiltinFunctionsNullIT (44 - null handling), CalciteDateTimeFunctionIT (18 - more datetime funcs), CalciteBinCommandIT (25 - bin/span), CalcitePPLJoinIT (18 - join issues).
